steps.exact_content:
Subject: Scheduling Copilot Launch Commitment

Team,

I am committing to a public launch of Scheduling Copilot on 2025-09-30. This date is conditional: we need three design-partner signings within the next 14 days (by 2025-09-16). If we achieve this, the launch proceeds as planned. If not, this commitment will be rescinded and we will reassess. I am using this as a forcing function to accelerate partner recruitment.

- Mara
